'''âz-p-s-g''' ('''kazapsegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weel|weel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weel|weel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-p-s-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazapsegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizapsegoko|thizapsegoko]] || [[word:jizapsegoko|jizapsegoko]] || [[word:shizapsegoko|shizapsegoko]] || [[word:kizapsegoko|kizapsegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzapsegoko|thuthuzapsegoko]] || [[word:jujuzapsegoko|jujuzapsegoko]] || [[word:shushuzapsegoko|shushuzapsegoko]] || [[word:kukuzapsegoko|kukuzapsegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozapsegoko|thozapsegoko]] || [[word:jozapsegoko|jozapsegoko]] || [[word:shozapsegoko|shozapsegoko]] || [[word:kozapsegoko|kozapsegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚzapsegoko|thĂŚzapsegoko]] || [[word:jĂŚzapsegoko|jĂŚzapsegoko]] || [[word:shĂŚzapsegoko|shĂŚzapsegoko]] || [[word:kĂŚzapsegoko|kĂŚzapsegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazapsegoko|thazapsegoko]] || [[word:jazapsegoko|jazapsegoko]] || [[word:shazapsegoko|shazapsegoko]] || [[word:kazapsegoko|kazapsegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazapsegoko|thazapsegoko]] || [[word:jazapsegoko|jazapsegoko]] || [[word:shazapsegoko|shazapsegoko]] || [[word:kazapsegoko|kazapsegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
